revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-4-045

Alternative term: Dahn buoy

A buoy which is fixed at the upper end of the buoy mooring chain to prevent its loss during the time the buoy is out of position. It is not an aid to navigation.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Dan buoy}}
